mapper.sql: ej.id, ej.source, ej.source_job_id, ej.source_url, ej.title, ej.company_name, ej.location, ej.job_category_raw, ej.employment_type_raw, ej.salary_raw, ej.posted_at, ej.deadline_at, ej.description, ej.original_payload_json, ej.payload_hash, ej.freelance_type, ej.recommendation_type, ej.recommendation_score, ej.is_visible, ej.visibility_reason, ej.collected_at, ej.updated_at

ej.id, ej.source, ej.source_job_id, ej.source_url, ej.title, ej.company_name, ej.location, ej.job_category_raw, ej.employment_type_raw, ej.salary_raw, ej.posted_at, ej.deadline_at, ej.description, ej.original_payload_json, ej.payload_hash, ej.freelance_type, ejcr.recommendation_type AS recommendation_type, ejcr.recommendation_score AS recommendation_score, ej.is_visible, ej.visibility_reason, ej.collected_at, ej.updated_at

if.test: condition != null and condition.keyword != null and condition.keyword != ''

sql.if: AND ( ej.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.keyword}, '%') OR ej.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.keyword}, '%') OR ej.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.keyword}, '%') )

mapper.sql: INNER JOIN external_job_category_recommendation ejcr ON ejcr.external_job_id = ej.id AND ejcr.job_category = #{condition.jobCategory} AND ejcr.recommendation_type != 'EXCLUDED'
ORDER BY ejcr.recommendation_score DESC, ej.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO external_job ( source, source_job_id, source_url, title, company_name, location, job_category_raw, employment_type_raw, salary_raw, posted_at, deadline_at, description, original_payload_json, payload_hash, freelance_type, recommendation_type, recommendation_score, is_visible, visibility_reason, collected_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{source}, #{sourceJobId}, #{sourceUrl}, #{title}, #{companyName}, #{location}, #{jobCategoryRaw}, #{employmentTypeRaw}, #{salaryRaw}, #{postedAt}, #{deadlineAt}, #{description}, #{originalPayloadJson}, #{payloadHash}, #{freelanceType}, #{recommendationType}, #{recommendationScore}, COALESCE(#{visible}, 1), COALESCE(#{visibilityReason}, 'VISIBLE'), #{collectedAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE title = VALUES(title), source_url = VALUES(source_url), company_name = VALUES(company_name), location = VALUES(location), job_category_raw = VALUES(job_category_raw), employment_type_raw = VALUES(employment_type_raw), salary_raw = VALUES(salary_raw), posted_at = VALUES(posted_at), deadline_at = VALUES(deadline_at), description = VALUES(description), original_payload_json = VALUES(original_payload_json), payload_hash = VALUES(payload_hash), freelance_type = VALUES(freelance_type), recommendation_type = VALUES(recommendation_type), recommendation_score = VALUES(recommendation_score), is_visible = VALUES(is_visible), visibility_reason = VALUES(visibility_reason), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)

INSERT INTO external_job_user_recommendation ( user_email, external_job_id, job_category, recommendation_type, recommendation_score, matched_by ) VALUES ( #{userEmail}, #{externalJobId}, #{jobCategory}, #{recommendationType}, #{recommendationScore}, #{matchedBy} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE recommendation_type = VALUES(recommendation_type), recommendation_score = VALUES(recommendation_score), matched_by = VALUES(matched_by), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO external_job_category_recommendation ( job_category, external_job_id, recommendation_type, recommendation_score, matched_by, reason ) VALUES ( #{jobCategory}, #{externalJobId}, #{recommendationType}, #{recommendationScore}, COALESCE(#{matchedBy}, 'LLM_PRECOMPUTED'), #{reason} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE recommendation_type = VALUES(recommendation_type), recommendation_score = VALUES(recommendation_score), matched_by = VALUES(matched_by), reason = VALUES(reason), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM external_job_category_recommendation ejcr INNER JOIN external_job ej ON ej.id = ejcr.external_job_id WHERE ejcr.job_category = #{jobCategory} AND ejcr.recommendation_type != 'EXCLUDED' AND ej.is_visible = 1 AND ej.freelance_type != 'NOT_FREELANCE'
mapper.update: UPDATE external_job SET is_visible = CASE WHEN freelance_type = 'NOT_FREELANCE' THEN 0 WHEN deadline_at IS NOT NULL AND deadline_at < #{now} THEN 0 WHEN deadline_at IS NULL AND COALESCE(posted_at, collected_at, updated_at) < #{staleBefore} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, visibility_reason = CASE WHEN freelance_type = 'NOT_FREELANCE' THEN 'NOT_FREELANCE' WHEN deadline_at IS NOT NULL AND deadline_at < #{now} THEN 'EXPIRED' WHEN deadline_at IS NULL AND COALESCE(posted_at, collected_at, updated_at) < #{staleBefore} THEN 'NO_DEADLINE_STALE' ELSE 'VISIBLE' END WHERE source = #{source}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM external_job ej
WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT
FROM external_job ej WHERE 1 = 1 AND ej.is_visible = 1 AND ej.freelance_type != 'NOT_FREELANCE' ORDER BY ej.recommendation_score DESC, ej.id DESC

SELECT
FROM external_job ej WHERE ej.source = #{source} ORDER BY ej.id
mapper.update: UPDATE external_job SET freelance_type = #{freelanceType}, recommendation_type = #{recommendationType}, recommendation_score = #{recommendationScore}, is_visible = COALESCE(#{visible}, 1), visibility_reason = COALESCE(#{visibilityReason}, 'VISIBLE'), updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND source = 'SEOUL'
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM external_job ej WHERE ej.id = #{id} AND ej.is_visible = 1 AND ej.freelance_type != 'NOT_FREELANCE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO external_job_collection_log ( source, collection_type, status, requested_page_size, requested_max_pages, fetched_count, upserted_count, skipped_count, failed_count, succeeded_pages, failed_pages, first_failed_page, message, started_at, ended_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{source}, #{collectionType}, #{status}, #{requestedPageSize}, #{requestedMaxPages}, #{fetchedCount}, #{upsertedCount}, #{skippedCount}, #{failedCount}, #{succeededPages}, #{failedPages}, #{firstFailedPage}, #{message}, #{startedAt}, #{endedAt}, #{createdAt} )

INSERT INTO external_job_collection_lock ( source, locked_by, locked_at, locked_until, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{source}, #{lockedBy}, #{lockedAt}, #{lockedUntil}, #{updatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE locked_by = IF(locked_until <= #{lockedAt}, VALUES(locked_by), locked_by), locked_at = IF(locked_until <= #{lockedAt}, VALUES(locked_at), locked_at), updated_at = IF(locked_until <= #{lockedAt}, VALUES(updated_at), updated_at), locked_until = IF(locked_until <= #{lockedAt}, VALUES(locked_until), locked_until)
